diffs.diff:
--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -141,7 +141,8 @@
     model = Qwen2_5_VLForConditionalGeneration.from_pretrained(

         model_id,

         torch_dtype=torch.bfloat16,

-        device_map=device

+        device_map=device,

+        trust_remote_code=True

     )

     

     model.gradient_checkpointing_enable()

@@ -149,36 +150,49 @@
     peft_config = LoraConfig(

         r=16,

         lora_alpha=32,

-        target_modules=["q_proj", "v_proj"],

-        task_type="CAUSAL_LM",

+        target_modules=["q_proj", "k_proj", "v_proj", "o_proj", "gate_proj", "up_proj", "down_proj"],

+        lora_dropout=0.05,

+        bias="none",

+        task_type="CAUSAL_LM"

     )

     model = get_peft_model(model, peft_config)

     model.print_trainable_parameters()

     

-    train_dataset = GUIDataset("/data/unified_train.jsonl", "/data", processor, max_samples=1000)

-    train_dataloader = DataLoader(train_dataset, batch_size=1, shuffle=True, collate_fn=collate_fn)

+    dataset = GUIDataset("/data/unified_train.jsonl", "/data", processor, max_samples=None)

+    dataloader = DataLoader(dataset, batch_size=2, shuffle=True, collate_fn=collate_fn, num_workers=2)

     

     optimizer = torch.optim.AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=1e-4)

     

     model.train()

+    epochs = 1

     step = 0

-    for epoch in range(1):

-        for batch in tqdm(train_dataloader, desc=f"Epoch {epoch+1}"):

+    gradient_accumulation_steps = 2

+    

+    for epoch in range(epochs):

+        logger.info(f"Starting epoch {epoch+1}/{epochs}")

+        pbar = tqdm(dataloader, desc=f"Epoch {epoch+1}")

+        for i, batch in enumerate(pbar):

             batch = {k: v.to(device) if isinstance(v, torch.Tensor) else v for k, v in batch.items()}

             

             outputs = model(**batch)

-            loss = outputs.loss

+            loss = outputs.loss / gradient_accumulation_steps

             

             loss.backward()

-            optimizer.step()

-            optimizer.zero_grad()

             

+            if (i + 1) % gradient_accumulation_steps == 0:

+                optimizer.step()

+                optimizer.zero_grad()

+            

+            step += 1

             if step % 10 == 0:

-                log_metric(step, loss.item())

-            step += 1

-            

-    model.save_pretrained("checkpoints/baseline")

-    processor.save_pretrained("checkpoints/baseline")

+                log_metric(step, loss.item() * gradient_accumulation_steps)

+                pbar.set_postfix({"loss": f"{loss.item() * gradient_accumulation_steps:.4f}"})

+                

+    output_dir = "checkpoints/epoch_1"

+    os.makedirs(output_dir, exist_ok=True)

+    model.save_pretrained(output_dir)

+    processor.save_pretrained(output_dir)

+    logger.info(f"Model saved to {output_dir}")

 

 if __name__ == "__main__":

     main()
